current_snapshot.renewal_headline: Then-current form of agreement (may be materially different, including fees)

contract_burden.renewal: Then-current form of agreement (may be materially different, including fees)

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Area of Protection dimensions and AOP Term length are individually negotiated — not disclosed in FDD. A prospective franchisee cannot evaluate territorial protection without seeing their specific FA.
Guarantor Monetary Threshold specific minimum net worth and minimum liquidity amounts are set per-deal in Exhibit B-1 to the FA. Not disclosed in FDD.
Criteria for when franchisor will require (vs. offer optional) revenue management services are described qualitatively but not quantitatively.
System Services Cost allocation methodology described at high level but actual formulas and per-hotel impact not disclosed.
Some pre-Two Roads Hospitality hotels under legacy contracts may pay less for same System Services. Extent of subsidy not disclosed.
No contractual limit on frequency or cost of required Technology System changes, upgrades, or updates.
No financial performance data of any kind provided (Item 19) for a franchise requiring $46M-$254M in investment.
